content: agent1: implementing 'Add Editor Session Timeout to Click's Edit Function' - will modify src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class, subprocess handling) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function signature + overloads). Let me know if you're touching these files.

Heads up: I already edited Editor.__init__ (added timeout param + validation), edit_file's Popen/wait call (wrapped in try/except TimeoutExpired with terminate), and edit()'s signature/docstring in termui.py to add a 'timeout' kwarg. Please re-read both files before editing so we merge cleanly - I added timeout as the last param after filename in edit(), and as last param in Editor.__init__ after extension. Let me know if you clobber my changes so I can re-check.

agent1: done implementing timeout param for click.edit(). patch.txt written. My changes to Editor.__init__/edit_file (termui_impl.py) and edit() (termui.py) are finalized on my end - safe to merge working_dir alongside timeout since they touch adjacent params/lines, but please diff carefully around Popen call in edit_file.
